title: Welkom, Free State — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Welkom, Free State: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Welkom is a city in Free State with a population of 260,000. A gold mining city in the Free State, built on the rich goldfields of the Witwatersrand basin.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
